zh.lifeSummary: Eunice Mary於大約1040年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾。她於大約1060年與Drogo de Baalon在法國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1080年在英國格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特享年42歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Eunice Mary于大约1040年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾。她于大约1060年与Drogo de Baalon在法国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1080年在英国格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特享年42岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Eunice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Greek name, derived from eu ‘well, good’ + nikē ‘victory’. This is mentioned in the New Testament as the name of the mother of Timothy, who introduced him to Christianity (2 Timothy 1:5). This reference led to the name being taken up by the Puritans in the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

en.lifeSummary: Eunice Mary was born about 1040, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. She married Drogo de Baalon about 1060, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died about 1080, in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 42, and was buried in Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Eunice Mary est née environ 1040, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Drogo de Baalon environ 1060, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1080, à Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Eunice Mary wurde um 1040 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat um 1060 in Frankreich Drogo de Baalon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1080 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Eunice Mary è nata il circa 1040 nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Drogo de Baalon circa 1060, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1080, nel Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Eunice Maryは約1040年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた。約1060年にフランスでDrogo de Baalonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1080年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスターで42歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eunice Mary(은)는 대략 1040년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1060년 프랑스에서 Drogo de Baalon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1080년 영국 그루스스터실르 그루스스터에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Eunice Mary nasceu aproximadamente 1040, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Drogo de Baalon aproximadamente 1060, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1080, em Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Eunice Mary родилась около 1040 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Drogo de Baalon около 1060 г. в местности Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1080 г. в местности глоусестир, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности глоусестиршир, Англия.
